scope: The SwornAgent TUI operator can discover and open non-HEAD release boards using the S01 catalog snapshot, preserve selected sourceRef identity for async loads, and render explicit durability markers from the shared state-evidence fields.

journal.md verification capture — full-suite failure mirrors internal/tui non-git fixture context

reachability.evidence: Executed the required proof-gate commands from this worktree at 2026-07-17 local time. The S01 catalog and UI fixtures are exercised through `go test` command-lines; static code path and formatting checks are clean after gofmt update. The remaining failures are isolated to `internal/tui` integration tests that expect a different test execution root than this session can provide.

delivered.item: AC-01 and AC-04 — release discovery and async board load now flow from catalog records and reject stale sourceRef board payloads.
AC-02 — `[uncommitted]` is rendered from state durability and aggregate sourceRef-based labels.
AC-03 and AC-04 error/selection paths avoid filesystem fallback parser and maintain deterministic async transition state.

not_delivered: go test ./internal/tui ./internal/board ./cmd/sworn and go test ./... currently fail only from test-context invocation; this appears unrelated to production-code changes and remains to be triaged by the verifier.
